categories.name: Character & Reference Sheets
categories.desc: High-quality, detailed reference sheets featuring multiple views, expressions, and color palettes to perfectly define your original characters.

categories.name: Posters & Cover Art
categories.desc: Cinematic, full-scale illustrations designed for maximum visual impact. Ideal for commercial projects, social media, or personal collections.

categories.name: VTuber Models
categories.desc: Professional-grade Live2D models with clean layering and precise cuts. Every file is optimized for fluid movement and high-fidelity rigging.

categories.name: Banners
categories.desc: Custom-tailored banners for all major platforms including Twitter, Twitch, and YouTube. Optimized for all devices.

categories.name: Emotes
categories.desc: Expressive, readable, and full of personality. Custom emotes designed to engage your community and enhance your brand.

categories.name: Streaming Overlays
categories.desc: Clean, modern, and immersive overlays that bring your stream to life. Includes alerts, scenes, and UI elements.

about.title: Warry's Story
about.quote: Bringing warmth and magic to every character I touch.
about.description: I'm a self-taught digital illustrator with a deep passion for creating **warm, cozy, and dreamy artwork.** My style is heavily inspired by anime aesthetics, soft cinematic lighting, and the organic nature of playful characters.
